entries.title: ON THE PSALM 29:7 on wisdom 1:15
entries.excerpt: When I prospered, sowing in righteousness and reaping the fruits of righteousness, I was in such a state that I could never waver. If "whoever does the will of God remains forever" and his "righteousness is immortal," I indeed said this when I received the fruits of righteousness and prospered. I spoke thus to my soul, just as with the word according to which "no one can say 'Jesus is Lord' …" I confessed this with my soul and with my life when I prospered and bore fruits of virtue, because I will never waver, according to the word: "Whoever believes, and whoever lives and believes, will never die," and "The righteousness of the Lord remains forever."
